title: Truboglaz creatures
description: This mod adds different real and fictional creatures, as well as various items and weapons
body:
This mod adds a variety of real and fictional creatures.Some creatures have mutations such as: albinism, piebald, melanism.**For this mod, you need to download gekolib**
![truboglaz creatures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c3dcaa691d792f6d4e18c90e7d8f75579fba335.png)
